mechanism_narrative: A rising FEDFUNDS rate over the prior month signals tightening financial conditions and a higher discount rate, which दब दब? No, positively: it depresses S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the policy rate is moving up rather than stable or falling.
failure_condition: Rejected if 20d forward SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of months when FEDFUNDS has risen over the previous month, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC stays above 0.03 in the opposite direction.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly acceleration in RSAFS indicates stronger nominal consumer spending, which supports revenue expectations and lifts S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The signal is strongest when sales growth is broad-based rather than isolated to one month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises above its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered observations do not produce higher median 20d returns than untriggered observations, or if negative 20d returns occur in at least 60% of trigger events over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A one-month increase in UNRATE reflects softening labor demand and rising recession risk, which should predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as equity markets reprice growth and earnings expectations.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp from the prior month
failure_condition: Rejected if 5d forward SPX returns are not negative on average after UNRATE increases, or if the hit rate for negative returns after the trigger is below 55% over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO and PAYEMS both improve together, the economy is expanding on both the production and employment sides, which supports cyclical earnings and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. The mechanism fails when output rises without labor confirmation.
failure_condition: Rejected if the joint positive-signal state does not outperform single-series states, or if 60d forward returns are not positive in at least 55% of periods where both proxies trend up together.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation running high while the policy rate is also elevated signals restrictive real financing conditions, which should compress valuation multiples and lower S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The signal is strongest when CPIAUCSL is rising faster than the funds rate can adjust.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL is above its 6-month average and FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0%
failure_condition: Rejected if periods meeting both conditions fail to show lower 20d returns than baseline, or if the sign of the effect turns positive in a sustained way across any 3-year rolling sample.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST signals weakening residential demand and a broad slowdown in interest-sensitive activity, which should lead S&P 500 returns lower over the next 60 trading days. The mechanism is invalid if housing weakness is not followed by weaker equity performance.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Rejected if 60d forward SPX returns are not below unconditional returns after the trigger, or if the trigger produces no negative skew in outcomes across a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS level combined with a rising UNRATE identifies a deteriorating labor market, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings risk and default risk rise. If only one of the two series weakens, the signal should be much weaker.
failure_condition: Rejected if the joint deterioration state does not outperform each single-series condition in predicting negative returns, or if 20d returns are positive in more than 50% of joint-signal cases.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in INDPRO after prior weakness signals a re-acceleration in industrial supply and cyclical activity, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days during recovery phases. The signal should fail during late-cycle slowdowns because production gains then reflect temporary inventory effects rather than durable growth.
failure_condition: Rejected if 5d forward returns are not positive after two-month INDPRO rebounds, or if the effect disappears entirely when tested separately in recovery periods versus slowdown periods.
